nasb.text: Now Jehu came out to the servants of his master, and one said to him, “Is all well? Why did this mad fellow come to you?” And he said to them, “You know very well the man and his talk.”

esv.text: When Jehu came out to the servants of his master, they said to him, “Is all well? Why did this mad fellow come to you?” And he said to them, “You know the fellow and his talk.”

cnv.text: 耶戶出來，到他主人的臣僕那裡去；他們問他說：“一切都平安嗎？那瘋子來見你有甚麼事呢？”他對他們說：“你們認識這個人，也知道他說些甚麼。”

ccb.text: 耶户出来回到同僚那里，一个人问他：“没事吧？那疯子为什么来找你？”耶户答道：“你们认得他，也知道他会说什么。”
